meaning: adj.受到优待的,有天赋的,受优惠的,有利的,受惠的,幸运的
examples: The pull mechanism has long been favored by most scientists.
They do their favored activity whenever and wherever possible.
They prioritize their favored activity over what they should do.
Even more than in Canada, in Japan projects like this are gravy-laden for the favored few.
Former club insiders say McMorris favored management by committee, avoiding tough decisions as he tried to please everyone.
